pullRequest.title: Mark Windows support limitation: win10+ only
Python 3.14 compatibility: adjust `AsyncioEventLoop`
pullRequest.body:
Do not use `EventLoopPolicy` related methods:
removed in python 3.14
Initialize event loop explicit instead.

Fix #951

pullRequest.title: Packaging: drop setup.py and adjust requirements
pullRequest.body:
* `setup.py` was useful for sdist installs with old toolchain, but it takes priority in metadata forming
* Require `exceptiongroup` only for python < 3.11: code already will not use it under python 3.11
* run tests on windows for python 3.13: windows-curses published package for python 3.13

Fix #1017

pullRequest.title: Add guard against empty list on focus complete.
pullRequest.body:
This commit will prevent on occasional crash when events are quickly updates listbox, and in effect it makes calculate_visible method to return tuple of three Nones, and effectively crash the app in a try to unpack data supposed to be there.
